acceptance_targets: [chapter_13_award_01] Pass if the revised ending still reaches a provisional housing plan, but after the beats anchored at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:363 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:543 at least one live disagreement about equivalence, trust, or feasibility remains active on the page through the final paragraph. Fail if the scene again resolves into a clean shared thesis plus a symbolic closure gesture that makes the damage feel settled for the night.

[chapter_13_craft_01] Pass if a reader can feel the downgrade in the revised passage by reading the listings, costs, route implications, and domestic compromises around snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:507 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:555 without needing back-to-back thematic summary sentences to explain it. Fail if the scene still pauses to tell us, in abstract terms, what version of the marriage or corridor the couple has been preserving.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised ending still reaches a provisional housing plan, but after the beats anchored at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:363 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:543 at least one live disagreement about equivalence, trust, or feasibility remains active on the page through the final paragraph. Fail if the scene again resolves into a clean shared thesis plus a symbolic closure gesture that makes the damage feel settled for the night.
findings.problem: The chapter's central exposure turns too quickly into tidy symmetry: Ben's debt, Nita's Mina loans, the apartment assignments, and the cut-up card all align into a neat mutual-thesis ending instead of leaving enough asymmetry and damage on the table for shortlist-level force.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework the equivalence beats at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:363 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:371, then the planning/closure beats at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:543, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:579, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:605 so the two concealments stay related but not fully flattened into the same moral category. Keep the housing plan, but let one concrete disagreement about blame, feasibility, or class sacrifice remain unresolved through the final image rather than letting the severed card function as near-complete closure.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if a reader can feel the downgrade in the revised passage by reading the listings, costs, route implications, and domestic compromises around snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:507 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:555 without needing back-to-back thematic summary sentences to explain it. Fail if the scene still pauses to tell us, in abstract terms, what version of the marriage or corridor the couple has been preserving.
findings.problem: The late-night planning scene starts with strong paper-and-listing texture, then repeatedly steps out of the material problem to summarize what the marriage and household 'really' were. That interpretive pressure reduces the sting of the class drop just when the scene should stay inside rent math, custody logistics, and bodily downgrade.
findings.rewrite_direction: In the apartment-negotiation section anchored at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:507, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:515, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:537, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:555, replace at least some of the thematic summary with concrete consequences: what Leela loses, what either adult physically gives up, what the route becomes, what new manual labor appears, or what humiliations tomorrow's calls will force. Keep the intelligence of the scene, but let the conclusion arise from the paper and apartments rather than from repeated authorial explanation.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Prioritize structural and craft blockers first: causality, chapter architecture, stakes clarity, continuity logic, and all HIGH/CRITICAL defects.
revision_pass.label: HIGH/CRITICAL structural/craft fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into the ugly overlap between office systems and intimate life: sweat under formalwear, sponsored groceries in the middle of a fight, sex that clarifies nothing, a child noticing coercion through object logic. When choosing between elegant abstraction and embarrassing specificity, choose specificity unless the character is actively lying to themselves. If a scene risks becoming pure farce, restore weight through money, care work, or the body's limits; if it risks becoming solemn prestige fiction, let the absurd machinery stay absurd.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a draft replaces bodily fact, financial shame, sexual consequence, or emotional cruelty with tasteful summary, rewrite until the cost is present in scene rather than merely reported.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: High - contractions are the norm in spoken dialogue; uncontracted forms are reserved for emphasis, ritual formality, or character-specific self-control.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: No two consecutive chapters should move the same way. Follow spectacle with aftermath, ritual with drift, humiliation with quiet, revelation with preparation. Vary scene count, dialogue density, location spread, and whether the chapter advances by confrontation, seduction, dread, comic escalation, or changed understanding.
prose_style_profile.diction: Concrete contemporary English with room for corporate and systems language when characters would actually think or speak that way; every abstract term should be contaminated by bodily or household reality nearby.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: Close third that stays inside the current focalizer's sensory field and only shifts focalization at scene breaks.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Alternate dry compression for comic pressure with longer, accrual-based sentences when shame, fatigue, or desire flood the body. Let jokes land through timing and juxtaposition rather than narrator commentary.
